details.dominant_pattern: createSimpleContext from @opencode-ai/ui/context — all 21 providers use this pattern
details.local_state_mechanism: createStore (solid-js/store) — 167 matches across the app; createSignal reserved for simple booleans
details.persistence_engine: persisted() from @/utils/persist with 3 tiers: Persist.global (localStorage), Persist.workspace (file-per-directory), Persist.scoped (file-per-session). Backed by LRU cache (500 entries, 8MB), quota handling, eviction, and legacy migration.
details.real_time_sync: ServerSDK creates SSE connection; ServerSync processes events via applyGlobalEvent/applyDirectoryEvent reducers; optimistic updates via mergeOptimisticPage
details.cache_strategy: Pervasive LRU eviction: file content (40 entries/20MB), directory stores (30 dirs/20min TTL), session caches (40), terminals (20), prompts (20), comments (20), file views (20 sessions/500 files each)

details.electron_main_to_preload: 50+ ipcMain.handle() channels with typed ElectronAPI interface in packages/desktop/src/preload/types.ts
details.preload_to_renderer: contextBridge.exposeInMainWorld('api', api) — all 50+ methods exposed via window.api
details.renderer_types: Window interface augmented in app.tsx — incomplete (many window.api methods not declared); desktop renderer relies on implicit typing
details.type_consistency: Moderate — ElectronAPI is well-typed in preload but renderer side is ad-hoc
details.server_chain: Platform → Server → ServerSDK (SSE) → ServerSync (reducers + child stores) → SDK (directory-scoped)
details.offline_capability: None — ConnectionGate blocks UI until server health check passes. Background checks with 10s timeout.

hardcoded_constants.context: Hardcoded absolute URL for notification icon.

hardcoded_constants.what: Default server URL detection: location.hostname.includes('opencode.ai') → localhost:4096
hardcoded_constants.context: Hardcoded domain detection and magic port number.
Storage key string not in constants file.

hardcoded_constants.what: Font defaults (System Mono, System Sans, JetBrainsMono) and layout feature flag based on VITE_OPENCODE_CHANNEL !== 'prod'
hardcoded_constants.context: Font names are reasonable; env-based feature flag is fragile.

hardcoded_constants.what: Hardcoded URLs: opencode.ai/docs, discord, github issues

hardcoded_constants.context: Hardcoded SVG URL for OpenCode project icon.

hardcoded_constants.what: Default server placeholder: http://localhost:4096 in 19 locale files
hardcoded_constants.context: Magic port number duplicated in every locale.

details.dynamic_imports_not_lazy: ~6 dialogs use import() inside event handlers — code-split but not Suspense-preloadable

locations: app.tsx:172 — top-level ErrorBoundary wrapping AppBaseProviders with Sentry
use-session-commands.tsx:265 — local boundary around message action buttons
error_boundaries.assessment: Single top-level boundary covers entire app. No per-route or per-component isolation.

test_gaps: No tests for app.tsx (provider composition, routing)
No tests for layout.tsx (942 lines, critical state)
No tests for many component dialogs

large_files.risk: Layout, sidebar, header, keybindings all in one file
Rendering, state, keyboard shortcuts, followups, revert, scroll management
Persistence, migration, session tabs, project management
Complex persistence engine in single file
Central sync hub coordinating SDK, queries, and global state

hooks_assessment.dominant_pattern: Inline reactive primitives — createMemo (214+ in components), createEffect (42+), createSignal (56+) spread across components
hooks_assessment.concern: prompt-input.tsx alone has ~30 createMemo calls. layout.tsx has ~30 createMemo. These should be extracted.

routing.provider_nesting: Router wrapped inside: ServerProvider → ServersProvider → ConnectionGate → ServerKey → QueryProvider → ServerSDKProvider → ServerSyncProvider (10+ levels total)

strengths: Well-typed Electron IPC bridge with comprehensive ElectronAPI interface (50+ typed methods)
Sophisticated persistence engine with LRU cache, quota handling, eviction, legacy migration, and platform adaptation (web localStorage vs desktop IPC store)
Real-time bidirectional server sync with SSE event stream, global event reducer pattern, and optimistic updates
Consistent context provider pattern — all 21 providers use createSimpleContext from @opencode-ai/ui/context
Well-layered provider dependency chain (Platform → Server → ServerSDK → ServerSync → SDK) with no circular dependencies
Lazy-loaded routes with code splitting on the two main page bundles
Top-level ErrorBoundary with Sentry integration for crash reporting
Comprehensive i18n with 19 locales, dynamic import, and UI bridge pattern
Good test presence (~143 test files) co-located with source, including tests for most context providers and utilities
Strong platform abstraction (Platform type) that cleanly separates web vs desktop behavior with optional methods
Extensible command palette system with typed keybindings and registration API
Pervasive LRU eviction strategy preventing unbounded memory growth across all caches
Workspace-scoped and session-scoped persistence keys derived from path checksums
weaknesses: Excessive provider nesting depth (10+ levels) — can impact SolidJS reactivity performance and debugging
Hardcoded URLs (opencode.ai, localhost:4096) and localStorage keys scattered across files rather than centralized in constants
Window.api type declarations in renderer are incomplete — methods added ad-hoc without matching ElectronAPI interface
Only 1 custom hook in src/hooks/ — reactive logic inlined in components with excessive createMemo usage (30+ in prompt-input.tsx alone)
Giant monolithic files: layout.tsx (2396 lines), session.tsx (1845 lines), context/layout.tsx (942 lines)
Only 2 ErrorBoundary instances — no per-route or per-component error isolation. One crash takes down the entire app.
No offline capability — ConnectionGate blocks the entire UI if server is unreachable
Type duplication: AgentDef and McpServerEntry types exist in both packages/app/src/types/ and packages/desktop/src/preload/types.ts with identical shapes — drift risk
No automated e2e tests in packages/app directory
Feature flag (VITE_OPENCODE_CHANNEL) is string-based env comparison with no runtime toggle mechanism or devtools
Commented-out Suspense fallback in app.tsx (RouterRoot) — dead code
Lazy loading is sparse — only 2 route-level lazy() calls. 6+ dialogs use dynamic import() without lazy() (not Suspense-preloadable)
Mixed code-splitting patterns (lazy vs dynamic import) for dialogs — inconsistent
recommendations: Extract hardcoded URLs (opencode.ai, localhost:4096) and magic values into a centralized config/constants module
Complete Window.api type declarations in app.tsx to match the full ElectronAPI interface
Create composable hooks in src/hooks/ by extracting repeated memo chains from prompt-input.tsx, layout.tsx, and message-timeline.tsx
Split large files: extract layout concerns from pages/layout.tsx into focused modules; split session.tsx into manageable units
Add per-route error boundaries (ErrorBoundary on each Route) for better error isolation
Consolidate duplicate type definitions (AgentDef, McpServerEntry) between packages/app and packages/desktop into a shared package
Implement graceful offline fallback with cached last-known-good data instead of blocking at connection gate
Consider reducing provider nesting depth with context composition or a consolidation step
Adopt consistent lazy() pattern for all dialogs instead of mixed dynamic import() usage
Add e2e tests for critical user flows
Extract magic cache limits (CACHE_MAX_ENTRIES, CACHE_MAX_BYTES, health check timeout) into configurable constants

out_of_scope_findings.finding: Type duplication: AgentDef and McpServerEntry defined independently in packages/app/src/types/ and packages/desktop/src/preload/types.ts
